name: Artifact

props.name: src
props.description: URL the preview iframe frames.

props.name: files
props.type: undefined | { path: string; url?: undefined | string; code?: undefined | string; language?: undefined | string; type?: undefined | "html" | "pdf" | "image" | "other" }[]
props.displayType: undefined | { path: string; url?: undefined | string; code?: undefined | string; language?: undefined | string; type?: undefined | "html" | "pdf" | "image" | "other" }[]
props.description: Files for the Code tab's tree (+ each file's preview `url`).

props.name: tab
props.description: Active tab. Default `preview`.

props.name: activeFile
props.description: Selected file path (syncs tree highlight + Code source + preview).

props.name: sandbox
props.description: iframe `sandbox` override. Default `allow-scripts allow-forms`.

props.name: iframeTitle
props.description: Accessible iframe title.

props.name: maximized
props.description: Controlled maximize view-state (drives the expand/restore button).

props.name: showNav
props.description: Show the back/forward nav buttons. Default `true`.

props.name: showReload
props.description: Show the reload button. Default `true`.

props.name: showHome
props.description: Show the home button. Default `true`.

props.name: showPathField
props.description: Show the editable path/address field. Default `true`.

props.name: showTabs
props.description: Show the Preview|Code tab toggle. Default `true`.

props.name: expandable
props.description: Show the expand-to-fill button. Default `false` (opt-in).

props.name: openInTab
props.description: Show the open-in-new-tab button. Default `false` (opt-in).

props.name: standalone
props.description: Standalone chrome: rounded + bordered (default in-panel = square, borderless).

props.name: readonlyPath
props.description: Make the path field read-only (visible, nav-tracking, non-editable).

callbacks.name: onTabChange
callbacks.description: Fired when the Preview|Code tab changes.

callbacks.name: onFileSelect
callbacks.description: Fired when a file is selected in the tree.

callbacks.name: onMaximizeChange
callbacks.description: Fired when the expand/restore button toggles the maximize view-state.

description: `Artifact` — a framed, switchable generated-artifact viewer. A functional nav toolbar (back · forward · reload · home + editable path field + Preview|Code toggle) over a sandboxed `<iframe>` (Preview) or a file-tree + `<kc-code-block>` (Code). The component self-navigates the iframe and emits `navigate` / `tabchange` / `fileselect` so a consumer can observe/sync.

name: Card

props.name: heading
props.description: Heading rendered in the card chrome (the contract's CardEnvelope.title). NB: NOT `title` — `title` is a reserved IDL attr (see define.tsx RESERVED).

props.name: description
props.description: Optional supporting text under the heading.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: When set, the card renders its standard inline error state INSTEAD of body.

props.name: dense
props.description: Compact spacing for dense lists of cards.

props.name: headingId
props.description: Stable id for the heading (so composing cards can `aria-labelledby` it). Auto-generated when omitted.

description: `Card` — the shared presentational chrome every native card composes from: an optional media region, a heading + description, a body (default slot), an actions footer, and one consistent inline **error** state (the contract's "never a broken/partial card" rule). It is intentionally chrome-only: it reads no `CardContext` and emits no `CardEvent` — the cards that compose it (e.g. `kc-form`) own the contract interaction.

description: Inert, themed fallback for an unsupported card type. Emits nothing itself — the dispatcher emits the contract `error` event alongside rendering this.

description: `ChoiceCard` — a single-select "pick one of N rich options" card (plans, products, flights, quick replies) inside `Card` chrome. The options are a WAI-ARIA radiogroup (list rows) with roving tabindex: clicking a row (or Space/Enter on the focused row) **selects** it locally without emitting; a **Submit** button below the list then emits the Card contract's **`action`** verb (`{ kind:'action', cardId, action: option.id, payload }`) and resolves the card (chosen option shown read-only) so the same pick can't double-fire. An optional `allowOther` free-text escape appends a selectable "Other…" row; selecting it reveals an inline text input, and the same Submit emits `action:'__other__'` with `{ text }`. Emits `ready` on mount and `error` for an unusable definition (inline error state).

description: `Embed` — a privacy-first lazy media facade. Initial render is a poster + a play button: NO provider iframe, NO provider JS, NO cookies until the user opts in. On play it swaps in the provider `<iframe>` (youtube-nocookie / vimeo dnt / allowlisted generic). A persistent "Open on {provider}" affordance routes the contract `open` verb so a blocked embed is never a dead end. The only verbs it emits are lifecycle `ready`, `open`, and failure `error`.

name: Resizable

props.name: withHandle
props.description: Show a visible grip on each interactive handle.

props.name: maximizedIndex
props.description: Which panel index is maximized (null = none). Hides the others.

callbacks.name: onChange
callbacks.description: Fired on drag-end / keyboard resize / visibility change with the current panel sizes (percent).

callbacks.name: onMaximizeChange
callbacks.description: Fired when the maximized panel changes (index, or null on restore).

description: Convenience group that takes `ResizablePanel` children and AUTO-INSERTS a `ResizableHandle` between each pair of visible (non-`hidden`) panels. A handle is interactive only between two unlocked neighbors; otherwise it renders as a static divider. Power users who need manual control can keep using `ResizablePanelGroup` + explicit `ResizableHandle`s.

props.name: keyboardStep
props.description: Keyboard nudge step in pixels (default 16). Home/End jump to min/max.

props.name: static
props.description: Render as a static, non-interactive divider (e.g. between locked panels).

props.name: orientation
props.description: Explicit axis; overrides `ResizableContext`. Needed by facades that render handles outside a context provider (e.g. `<kc-resizable>`).

props.name: defaultSize
props.description: Initial main-axis size: number/`"25%"` (percent) or `"280px"` (pixels). Omitted → flexible.

props.name: minSize
props.description: Minimum size during resize (px or %).

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Maximum size during resize (px or %).

props.name: locked
props.description: When true, the panel's size is fixed and adjacent handles are non-draggable.

props.name: hidden
props.description: When true, the panel is not visible (used by the `Resizable` convenience to drop dividers).
